title: dupatya elata
intro: Dupatya elata, also known as the 'Indian gentian', is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and glycosides, which have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Dupatya elata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
